_comment: Production schedule for CASE-001 — Hamburg Precision Components GmbH. Simulates Excel/MES production plan. Used to determine customer impact and production start dependency.
_note: If material does not arrive by 2026-06-14 (stockout date), Line 2 stops. Customer commitment date is 2026-06-24. With 14-day delay, material arrives 2026-07-04 — 10 days after customer commitment. Expediting avoids this entirely.
